retry_reason: Not a wrapper; failure (e.g., invalid packet type) leads to freeing the skb—retrying would use a stale pointer.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to enqueue an sk_buff for transmission based on packet type; error handling calls kfree_skb (a put) but this is incidental. No reference-counted object is returned or passed to the caller. The function does not acquire or transfer a reference as its main goal.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper; failure (e.g., invalid packet type) leads to freeing the skb—retrying would use a stale pointer.

final.retry_reason: Not a wrapper; failure (e.g., invalid packet type) leads to freeing the skb—retrying would use a stale pointer.
